channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-18305] replay-single test_70f: FAIL: Restart of ost7 failed!
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/c289c5a6-ed6c-4f70-b0a2-d3b7ace5a9f1

test_70f failed with the following error:

CMD: trevis-56vm4 lsmod | grep zfs >&/dev/null || modprobe zfs;
			zpool list -H lustre-ost3 >/dev/null 2>&1 ||
			zpool import -f -o cachefile=none -o failmode=panic -d /dev/vg_Role_OSS lustre-ost3
trevis-56vm4: libkmod: kmod_module_get_holders: could not open '/sys/module/zfs/holders': No such file or directory
trevis-56vm4: The ZFS modules are not loaded.
trevis-56vm4: Try running '/sbin/modprobe zfs' as root to load them.
pdsh@trevis-65vm4: trevis-56vm4: ssh exited with exit code 1
trevis-56vm4: libkmod: kmod_module_get_holders: could not open '/sys/module/zfs/holders': No such file or directory
trevis-56vm4: libkmod: kmod_module_get_holders: could not open '/sys/module/zfs/holders': No such file or directory
trevis-56vm4: cannot import 'lustre-ost3': no such pool available
pdsh@trevis-65vm4: trevis-56vm4: ssh exited with exit code 1
trevis-56vm4: cannot import 'lustre-ost5': no such pool available
trevis-56vm4: cannot import 'lustre-ost4': no such pool available
pdsh@trevis-65vm4: trevis-56vm4: ssh exited with exit code 1
pdsh@trevis-65vm4: trevis-56vm4: ssh exited with exit code 1
trevis-56vm4: cannot import 'lustre-ost7': no such pool available
pdsh@trevis-65vm4: trevis-56vm4: ssh exited with exit code 1
trevis-56vm4: cannot import 'lustre-ost1': no such pool available
pdsh@trevis-65vm4: trevis-56vm4: ssh exited with exit code 1
 replay-single test_70f: @@@@@@ FAIL: Restart of ost7 failed! 
trevis-56vm4: cannot import 'lustre-ost2': no such pool available
pdsh@trevis-65vm4: trevis-56vm4: ssh exited with exit code 1

Timeout occurred after 388 minutes, last suite running was replay-single

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4581 - 5.14.0-427.31.1.el9_4.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4581 - 5.14.0-427.31.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
replay-single test_70f - Timeout occurred after 388 minutes, last suite running was replay-single
item.summary: replay-single test_70f: FAIL: Restart of ost7 failed!

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment: The failure occurred many times in failover-zfs-part-1 test sessions in the last 6 months.
